{{Tabs dynamic/end}} ===Format=== '''''Skyesports Championship 3.0:''' 21st August 2021 to 12th September 2021''. * '''''Qualifiers Round 1:''' 21st August 2021 to 25th August 2021'' ** '' A total of 1000 teams will play in Qualifiers Round 1 ** '' Teams to be divided into 50 groups''. ** '' Each team will get to play a single match'' ** '' Top 4 Teams from each group will qualify for the Qualifiers Round 2''. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 200 teams}} advance to ''Qualifiers Round 2''.
* '''''Qualifiers Round 2:''' 26th August 2021'' ** '' A total of 200 teams will play in Qualifiers Round 2'' ** '' Teams to be divided into 10 groups''. ** '' Each team will get to play a total of 2 matches'' ** '' Top 2 Teams from each group will qualify for the Quarter Finals''. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 20 teams}} advance to ''Quarter Finals''.
* '''''Quarter Finals:''' 28th August 2021'' ** '' A total of 40 teams (20 Qualified from Qualifiers Round 2 + 20 Invited) will play in the Quarter Finals'' ** '' Teams to be divided into 2 groups''. ** '' Each team will get to play a total of 4 matches'' ** '' Top 4 Teams from each group will qualify for the Semi Finals''. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 8 teams}} advance to ''Semi Finals''.
* '''''Semi Finals:''' 30th August 2021 to 4th September 2021'' ** '' A total of 24 teams (8 Qualified from Quarter Finals + 16 Invited) will play in the Semi Finals'' ** '' Teams to be divided into 4 groups''. ** '' Each team will get to play a total of 21 matches'' ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 18 teams from the overall standings}} advance to ''Grand Finals''.
* '''''Grand Finals:''' 6th September 2021 to 12th September 2021'' ** '' A total of 18 qualified teams will play in the Grand Finals'' ** '' Teams will get to play a total of 42 matches in a period of 7 days'' ** '' Each day will feature a total of 6 matches'' ====Matchdays==== * ''7 Matchdays: 6 Matches Each Day.'' ** '''''Map Rotation''''': ''E>>M>>E>>S>>M>>E'' ==Prize Pool== ₹ 26,00,000 ===Format===
''''' Rooter Pro Scrims: Conqueror Phase:''' 25th August 2021 to 27th August 2021.''

Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]], and [[Sanhok]]

* '' A total of 20 teams will play in the Conqueror Phase''
* ''Top 17 teams qualified from the ([https://liquipedia.net/pubg/Rooter_Pro_Scrims/Initial_Phase/ Initial Phase] + 3 Fan Favourite Teams ).''
* ''9 Matches to be played over a period of 3 days 
* ''Each team will play a total of 9 matches to decide the winner''.

* '''Quarter Finals:''''' November 22nd - 24th, 2025 ** 48 teams, 3 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 16. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 8 team from each group (Total 24 teams)}} advance to Semi Finals.
* '''Semi Finals:''''' November 26th - 27th, 2025 ** 24 teams, 2 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 8. ** Round-robin format. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} advance to the Grand Finals.
* '''Grand Finals:''''' November 28th - 30th, 2025 ** 16 teams, 3 matchdays. ** 18 matches (6 each day). ==Prize Pool== {{TeamPrizePool |{{Slot|localprize=250000|{{Opponent|Welt Esports}} }} ==About==
===Format===
* '''Round 1:''''' December 7th, 2025
** 2048 Teams, 1 matchday.
** Teams divided into 64 groups with 16 Teams in each group.
** Each team plays 1 match.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 6 Teams}} from each group qualifies for ''Round 2.

* '''Round 2:''''' December 8th, 2025
** 512 Teams, 1 matchday.
** Teams are divided into 32 groups with 16 Teams in each group.
** Each team plays 1 match.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 4 Teams}} from each group qualifies for ''Round 3.

* '''Round 3:''''' December 9th, 2025
** 128 Teams, 1 matchday.
** Teams are divided into 8 groups with 16 Teams in each group.
** Each team plays a total of 4 matches.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 6 Teams}} from each group qualifies for ''Round 4.

* '''Round 4:''''' December 10th - 11th ,2025
** 64 Teams, 2 matchdays.
** Teams are divided into 2 groups with 32 Teams in each group.
** Each team plays a total of 12 matches.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 9 Teams}} from each group advance to ''Pre-Quarter Finals.

* '''Pre-Quarter Finals:''''' December 12th - 14th, 2025
** 64 Teams, 3 matchdays.
** Teams are divided into 3 groups with 16 Teams in each group.
** Each team plays a total of 6 matches.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 12 Teams}} from each group advance to ''Quarter Finals.

* '''Quarter Finals:''''' December 15th - 17th, 2025
** 48 Teams, 3 matchdays.
** Teams are divided into 3 groups with 16 Teams in each group.
** Each team plays a total of 6 matches.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 8 Teams}} from each group advance to the ''Semi Finals.

* '''Semi Finals:''''' December 18th - 19th, 2025
** 24 Teams, 2 matchdays.
** Teams are divided into 3 groups with 8 Teams in each group.
** 18 matches.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 Teams}} from Overall Standings advance to the ''Grand Finals.

* '''Grand Finals:''''' December 20th - 22th, 2025
** 16 teams, 3 matchdays.
** 19 matches (6 matches on Day 1 and Day 2 and 7 matches on Day 3).
** '''Smash Rule''' is applied. {{SmashRule|matchpoint=Top 1's points after Match #13 + 10|maxmatch=6|margin-left=2em}}
